data.body: REMEDIATED per completion-verifier + the plan: (1) AC1 — the registry now LOADS FROM THE PROMPT LIBRARY: each criterion is a contract-bearing prompt file (src/rebar/llm/reviewers/plan_review_<id>.md, category plan-review-criterion) resolved via prompts.get_prompt + .rebar/prompts overrides; routing lives in the derived criteria_routing.json (analog of reviewers/index.json). The pass prompts (finder/verifier/coach/isf/container) are plan-review-pass library prompts resolved via resolve_prompt — NO inline prompt constants (removed PASS*_SYSTEM). criteria_v8.json is design-ref only. (2) AC5 — G3/G4 container criteria now run via orchestrator._run_container: (parent + ONE child) per call, both whole, aggregated; a too-big pairing is a failure finding; the complete sibling roster is fed so absence findings are cross-checked. Tests: criteria-load-from-library, project-override, no-inline-constants guard, container per-child + too-big. Coverage guard passes against the library.
